title: Pusher not pushing or app not registering events?
author: LunarDevelopment
body:
Hola, 

I know this is a generic help and not an issue with the repo but I was hoping for a bit of help on getting pusher working with the unedited install (other than .env pusher details)

I can't seem to get a message from the `php artisan dashboard:update` commands to the app. 

Got the following running in CLIs (OS X):
`php artisan serve`
`php artisan websockets:serve`
`php artisan queue:listen`
`php artisan queue:work` (just in case.. )

Then running any of the artisan dashboard commands shows up nothing on the pusher debug other than sporadic things like : 
```
SUBSCRIBED  262032.937786  Channel: private-dashboard  
and

DISCONNECTION    262113.619137    Channels: private-dashboard, Lifetime: 35.786499902s

CONNECTION 262261.180247 Origin:
```
I've got no webhook url configured in pusher and at no point have I put in pusher my local host ip and port (I'm assuming it just pushes to listeners who've subscribed so no need)

The JS/ Echo seems to be polling to try and get pusher shit but always comes back with no content: 
```
Request URL: http://sock119-mt1.pusher.com/pusher/app/12847e1e95f8290e9082/914/gejhiet4/xhr_send?t=1557933153736&n=2
Request Method: OPTIONS
Status Code: 204 No Content

Request URL: http://sock119-mt1.pusher.com/pusher/app/12847e1e95f8290e9082/914/gejhiet4/xhr_send?t=1557933153736&n=2
Request Method: POST
Status Code: 204 No Content
```

title: i can't install this project
author: MrKriKri
body:
first i do when i clone this project 
**composer install**
and i have :

> @php artisan package:discover

In Connection.php line 664:

  Database (C:\dashboard.spatie\database\database.sqlite) does not exist. (SQL: select * from sqlite_master where typ
  e = 'table' and name = users)


In SQLiteConnector.php line 34:

  Database (C:\dashboard.spatie\database\database.sqlite) does not exist.


Script @php artisan package:discover handling the post-autoload-dump event returned with error code 1

title: Error in parameters naming in .env.example
author: marioene
body:
Hi,

First, great demo! You are building amazing packages! 

A little error in env.example file (if we have to respect parameters naming from config/broadcasting.php):

At line 44, `PUSHER_KEY=` should be `PUSHER_APP_KEY=`

At line 45, `PUSHER_SECRET=` should be `PUSHER_APP_SECRET=`

title: Dashboard hangs every morning
author: freekmurze
body:
Often the dashboard is broken when it starts up on our raspberry pi. I suspect something goes wrong when switching from dark to light mode, but not sure.

We should connect remotely to the screen of the raspberry pi and check the console if there are any JavaScript errors there.

title: Weather API is down?
author: LarryBarker
body:
I have been following your post and have recreated my own version of the dashboard. Within the last hour or so, it seems that the Yahoo Weather API has been discontinued:

![image](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/28734844/50656438-da913980-0f58-11e9-89e2-4ded787f635a.png)


I haven't tried replacing the url with the one provided there, but I thought I would bring this to your attention if you we not already aware.

Thanks for being such a valuable resource the the Laravel community!

title: Tweets are not showing up
author: jetwes
body:
Everything worked fine, then suddenly the tweet tile is empty and new tweets aren't shown.
If i send a fake tweet i can see this error in the console
`https://pbs.twimg.com/profile_images/613846262383652864/3UKkvJFq_normal.jpg`

any guesses?

title: Websocket doesn't get events
author: jetwes
body:
My laravel-websockets doesn't receive any events. 
The socket is started: php artisan websockets:serve

The queue is running (redis)
i really don't know why i don't receive any events. php artisan dashboard:update shows no error.
Sending fake tweets shows no error. When i manually refresh the page i can see all generated fake tweets..

Any guess?
Thanks
Jens

title: Error SQLSTATE[42S02]: Base table or view not found: 1146 Table 'dashboard.users' on setup
author: gjportegies
body:
At the end of running composer install I'm getting the following error:

```
Generating autoload files> Illuminate\Foundation\ComposerScripts::postAutoloadDump
> @php artisan package:discover

In Connection.php line 664:
                                                                               
  SQLSTATE[42S02]: Base table or view not found: 1146 Table 'dashboard.users'  
   doesn't exist (SQL: select * from `users` limit 1)                          
                                                                               

In Connection.php line 326:
                                                                               
  SQLSTATE[42S02]: Base table or view not found: 1146 Table 'dashboard.users'  
   doesn't exist 
```

title: single tile uses fullscreen
author: mybigman
body:
Placing a single tile on the dashboard using a range say a1:a4 always uses all available space.

How can one occupy that upper left corner?

I tried adding columns and rows however this seems like it was removed?

title: Fresh install isn't possible.
author: StyxOfDynamite
body:
Migrations cannot be run as the AuthServiceProvider is booted which Queries the User Table (That doesn't exist)

```
auth()->login(User::first());
```

Needs Commenting out before it can run.
